name: Pardes Biosciences Inc. Common Stock
summary: Pardes Biosciences, Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company dedicated to discovering, developing and commercializing new medicines to improve the lives of patients suffering from life-threatening diseases, starting with coronaviruses. They are developing oral antiviral drugs that target the main protease (Mpro) of SARS-CoV-2. The company is headquartered in Carlsbad, California.
